---
id: compare-metrics
title: "Retrieve metrics for txn comparison"
description: "Retrieve metrics for txn comparison which is done by by comparing metrics from ES. This API is being called by Satellite."
sidebar_label: "Retrieve metrics for txn comparison"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve metrics for txn comparison"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/b/api/v1/publisher/compare/metrics/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve metrics for txn comparison which is done by by comparing metrics from ES. This API is being called by Satellite.
